# Boutique Management System - Project Setup

## Project Overview
- **Type**: Full-stack web application for boutique order management
- **Description**: Track customer orders for stitching saree blouses with queue management, timeline tracking, billing, and quality checklist
- **Tech Stack**: Node.js/Express backend, React frontend, SQLite database

## Setup Progress

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file in .github directory
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions (Not needed for this project)
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Requirements
- Customer booking and order creation
- Order queue and sorting by delivery date
- Timeline tracking (booking date, cutting deadline, delivery date)
- Bill generation and payment tracking
- Photo upload and WhatsApp group link
- Order status tracking (Booked → Cutting → Stitching → QC → Ready → Delivered)
- Lining handling workflow
- Final quality checklist
- Customer delivery management
